# Projectauto

Entry map for Projectauto tasks, workflow builder screens, settings, and API draft/publish routes.

## Verified paths

### Routes

- [Modules/Projectauto/Routes/web.php](../../Modules/Projectauto/Routes/web.php) — `/projectauto/tasks/*`, `/projectauto/settings/*`, `/projectauto/workflows/*`, and workflow API endpoints under `/projectauto/api/*`
- [Modules/Projectauto/Routes/api.php](../../Modules/Projectauto/Routes/api.php) — auth API route for `/projectauto/tasks`
